_comment: Structural and stylistic rules. Each rule has an id, a level, and a description. The linter (foundrkit-lint.mjs) reads this file alongside forbidden.json. Rules at level=block fail CI; rules at level=warn surface in the log but pass.

rules.description: No em-dashes (—) or — HTML entities. Use periods, commas, or colons. Em-dashes are the single most reliable AI tell.
No word or phrase from forbidden.json. The list covers globally-banned SaaS clichés, AI-era clutter, enthusiasm verbs, abstract noun clusters, and filler modifiers.
Median sentence length should stay under 20 words. Long sentences slow Linear's punchy register. Warns if more than 30% of sentences exceed 25 words.
Avoid stacking three or more adjectives in a row (e.g. 'fast, scalable, secure platform'). One adjective with a noun usually carries the same signal.

Prefer concrete subjects (named features, named teams, named numbers) over abstract noun phrases ('the system', 'our approach', 'the solution'). Warns when sentences begin with three or more consecutive abstract-noun subjects.
End posts with a specific next step, not a hedge. Block phrases like 'reach out', 'learn more', 'get in touch' when used as the closing line.
